production_note: agentic_K1 dual-LLM skeptic: sealed receipt write; packet-only; no bulk writers; no identity stamps
knowledge_boundary: Only landing + prior + active packet content.

exercises.code:
from pathlib import Path
import tempfile
td = Path(tempfile.mkdtemp())
p = td / 'intake.txt'
p.write_text('línea1\njosé\n', encoding='utf-8')
print(p.exists(), p.read_text(encoding='utf-8').splitlines())
exercises.justification_from_packet: pathlib Path con utf-8 explícito evita el locale del SO. write/read del paquete T1-A.

exercises.code:
from pathlib import Path
import tempfile
p = Path(tempfile.mkdtemp()) / 'a.txt'
with p.open('w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write('hola\n')
with p.open('a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write('extra\n')
print(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
exercises.justification_from_packet: with open w luego a: append sin pisar. Context manager cierra el handle.
Declarar utf-8 evita sorpresas en Windows/locale. ascii falla en tildes — lo demuestro.

exercises.code:
import csv, io
buf = io.StringIO()
writer = csv.writer(buf, lineterminator='\n')
writer.writerow(['id', 'n'])
print(repr(buf.getvalue()))
exercises.justification_from_packet: newline='' en archivos reales; aquí lineterminator \n para control del dialecto csv.

exercises.code:
from pathlib import Path
import os, tempfile
dest = Path(tempfile.mkdtemp()) / 'out.txt'
tmp = dest.with_suffix(dest.suffix + '.tmp')
tmp.write_text('hola\n', encoding='utf-8')
os.replace(tmp, dest)
print(dest.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
exercises.justification_from_packet: Atómico: escribir temp y os.replace al destino. Evita dest a medias.

exercises.code:
sample = b'a\r\nb\n'
print('tiene CRLF', b'\r\n' in sample)
print('salida del pipeline usa \\n')
exercises.justification_from_packet: Detectar CRLF; preferir \n en salidas del pipeline de ingesta.

exercises.code:
import csv, io
from decimal import Decimal
raw = 'id,nombre,monto\nC001,Ana,10.5\n'
for row in csv.DictReader(io.StringIO(raw)):
    row['monto'] = Decimal(row['monto']).quantize(Decimal('0.01'))
    print(row)
exercises.justification_from_packet: DictReader + Decimal.quantize. Cast explícito; no float.

exercises.code:
import csv, io
buf = io.StringIO()
w = csv.DictWriter(buf, fieldnames=['id', 'nombre'], lineterminator='\n')
w.writeheader()
w.writerow({'id': 'C001', 'nombre': 'Ana'})
print(buf.getvalue())
exercises.justification_from_packet: fieldnames declarados + writeheader = contrato de columnas.
Fallo de cast con traza, no 0 mágico. raise from conserva causa.

exercises.code:
import csv, io
text = 'id,nombre\nC001,Ana\nC002,Luis,EXTRA\nC003\n'
r = csv.reader(io.StringIO(text))
h = next(r)
good, bad = [], []
for row in r:
    if len(row) != len(h):
        bad.append({'raw': row, 'reason': f'cols {len(row)}!={len(h)}'})
    else:
        good.append(dict(zip(h, row)))
print('good', good)
print('bad', bad)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Irregulares a cuarentena con motivo. Demo exacto del theory code.

exercises.code:
print('quarantine fields: raw, reason, source, rownum')
print('nunca rellenar columnas de más/menos en silencio')
exercises.justification_from_packet: Diseño de quarantine.csv: raw + reason accionable para el revisor.
Duplicados no se silencian: motivo duplicate_id y conservo raw conceptual.

exercises.code:
import json
from datetime import date
data=[{'id':'T1','día':date(2026,1,15).isoformat()}]
s=json.dumps(data, ensure_ascii=False, sort_keys=True)
print(s)
print(json.loads(s)[0]['id'])
exercises.justification_from_packet: dumps/loads con fechas isoformat. sort_keys para determinismo.

exercises.code:
import json
from decimal import Decimal
p={'monto': str(Decimal('10.00'))}
s=json.dumps(p)
print(s, Decimal(json.loads(s)['monto']))
exercises.justification_from_packet: Monto exacto como string en JSON; al leer, Decimal de nuevo.

exercises.code:
import json
for line in [json.dumps({'id':'T1'}), json.dumps({'id':'T2'})]:
    print(json.loads(line))
print('JSONL=un objeto por línea')
exercises.justification_from_packet: JSONL stream: loads por línea. Útil para txs.
null presente vs clave ausente. Required check del theory.
setdefault añade default sin pisar si ya existe. Evolución compatible.
Campo opcional nuevo no rompe lectores de v1. Compatibilidad hacia atrás.

exercises.code:
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib, tempfile
src=Path(tempfile.mkdtemp())/'c.csv'
src.write_text('id\n1\n', encoding='utf-8')
h=hashlib.sha256(src.read_bytes()).hexdigest()
print(len(h), h[:12])
exercises.justification_from_packet: sha256 del input para fingerprint en el manifest.

exercises.code:
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib, tempfile, shutil
td=Path(tempfile.mkdtemp()); src=td/'c.csv'; src.write_text('x', encoding='utf-8')
bak=td/'c.bak'; shutil.copy2(src,bak)
print(hashlib.sha256(src.read_bytes()).digest()==hashlib.sha256(bak.read_bytes()).digest())
exercises.justification_from_packet: Backup copy2 conserva contenido; hashes iguales verifican integridad.
Manifest con contadores. Reconciliación n_in == clean + quarantine.

exercises.code: print('gate: utf-8, header, Decimal, quarantine+reason, sha256, reconcile, fail-closed')
exercises.justification_from_packet: Checklist del contrato de ingesta del paquete S08.

exercises.code:
n_in,n_clean,n_q=10,8,2
assert n_in==n_clean+n_q
print('reconcile OK', n_in, n_clean, n_q)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Assert de reconciliación del manifest. Si falla, no publico clean.

exercises.code:
print('si reconcile falla → exit non-zero / fail closed; no publicar clean a medias')
print('no borrar manifest; dejar traza del fallo')
exercises.justification_from_packet: Fail-closed del pipeline cuando n_in no cuadra. Política del selfcheck.

selfcheck.justification_from_packet: utf-8 explícito evita depender del locale del SO (p.ej. Windows). No es por velocidad.
Atómica = escribir temp y os.replace al destino, no open(dest,'w') directo como única opción.
Fila con columnas de más/menos → cuarentena con motivo; no silencio ni relleno mágico.
Reconciliación: n_in == n_clean + n_quarantine. El hash del clean no debe igualar el del input crudo.
Si reconcile falla, fail closed (exit non-zero). No publicar clean igual.
